name: Marie Dupont
description: With over 10 years of experience in international kitchens, Chef Marie leads the culinary vision of Savoure.

name: Luc Moreau
description: Chef Luc specializes in elegant French desserts and handcrafted pastries with modern presentation.

name: André Dubois
description: Chef André brings precision and creativity from years of experience in Michelin-inspired restaurants.

name: Aïcha Laurent
description: Chef Aïcha creates vibrant plant-based dishes focused on fresh ingredients and bold flavors.

name: Marc Lefevre
description: Chef Marc is known for perfectly grilled meats, signature marinades, and open-fire cooking techniques.

name: Nikolai Petrov
description: Chef Nikolai prepares artisan breads and traditional baked specialties fresh every morning.

name: Luca Romano
description: Chef Luca focuses on Mediterranean seafood dishes with refined textures and balanced seasoning.
